summary: Reference context is comprehensive and well-structured. All 3 requirement layers (structure, lifecycle enforcement, dead code removal) are covered by spec_plan entries. The previous revision addressed the missing scope-resolution-update entry and the workflow-tools key requirement error. Two minor relevance-scoring inconsistencies remain (state-machine.md and workflow-tools.md rated high without spec_plan entries) but these do not materially affect spec authoring — the spec_plan itself is correct and complete.

checklist_results.item: All affected crates/areas from pre-clarifications are covered by at least one spec
checklist_results.note: Structure layer: spec-structure-rules (create) + cli-commands-update. Lifecycle layer: reference-context-update, change-merge-update, scope-resolution-update. Dead code layer: change-spec-update, change-merge-update, artifact-tools-update. All covered.

checklist_results.item: Relevance scores are reasonable (high = directly implements, medium = related, low = background)
checklist_results.note: Minor: state-machine.md and workflow-tools.md are rated high but have no spec_plan entries (context-only, arguably should be medium). Does not affect spec authoring since spec_plan is the actionable output.

checklist_results.item: Key requirements listed per spec are accurate
checklist_results.note: Verified all 12 specs against actual content. reference-context.md lists BUG note for pre_filter_specs which is technically owned by scope-resolution.md, but the prompt template in reference-context.md consumes the output, so the cross-reference is acceptable.
All 12 specs are relevant. 2 low-relevance (agents, README) provide legitimate background.

checklist_results.item: spec_plan: every entry has main_spec_ref set (not null)
checklist_results.note: All 7 entries have valid main_spec_ref paths

checklist_results.item: spec_plan: sections are reasonable for the requirements
checklist_results.note: spec-structure-rules: overview+schema+logic+cli (appropriate for new validation rules spec). All 6 modify entries: changes section only.

checklist_results.item: spec_plan: modify entries have valid source paths
checklist_results.note: All 6 modify targets verified to exist under cclab/specs/: reference-context.md, change-merge.md, change-spec.md, commands.md, artifact-tools.md, scope-resolution.md
